title: Pinterest Wave Ω — Forensic Proof Engine

phase_1_root_cause.defect: Neither function called checkPcie2Lock(); they only honored PINTEREST_VIDEO_AUTO_PUBLISH. Therefore pinterest_publishing_global_stop=true had NO effect on the video pipeline.
phase_1_root_cause.guard_gap: scripts/pcie2-legacy-guard.mjs only forbade /v5/pins POST/PATCH — video uploads (/v5/media) were not blocked.

phase_4_merchant: UNVERIFIABLE via API (catalogs:* scope missing). Manual check: pinterest.com/business/catalogs
phase_5_billing: UNVERIFIABLE via API (ads:read scope missing). Manual check: ads.pinterest.com/billing

banned_phrases_observed: I wish I found this sooner
I stopped cleaning my litter box
This fixed the worst cat problem
This is why your house smells

phase_10_repairs_executed: Patched pinterest-video-queue-drain → calls checkPcie2Lock() before any work.
Tightened scripts/pcie2-legacy-guard.mjs → /v5/media POSTs forbidden outside pcie2-publisher.
Unscheduled 2 residual pinterest-video-* cron jobs, snapshotted to pinterest_cron_disabled_snapshot.
phase_12_dry_run: All publish paths (pcie2-publisher, pinterest-video-*) now hit checkPcie2Lock and return PCIE2_GLOBAL_STOP without calling /v5/pins or /v5/media.

blockers: OAuth lacks catalogs/ads scopes — merchant + billing health unverifiable via API.
19 banned-phrase pins from 2026-06-25 still live on Pinterest (must be archived manually or via authorized API call).
PCIE2 publish path intentionally disabled (pcie2_publish_enabled=false) pending Step 5 validation.
